svg.text: Key algorithmic and architectural innovations in flashscenic

g.text: CLI (3 commands + file I/O) or Python API · Dependencies: pandas, numba, dask, arboreto, ctxcore, pyarrow, ...
All computations on GPU · Data stays in tensor memory
Single call run_flashscenic() or separate steps
All TFs processed in one operation
Vectorized on GPU in one pass
Multi-database support: prune across multiple ranking DBs, merge by union or best NES
Leading edge: vectorized argmax(RCC − (μ+2σ)) for all enriched motifs at once
Rank on-the-fly via argsort (no storage overhead)
Add tiny noise (10⁻¹⁰), preserves gene identity
